message.content: When is the US federal income tax filing deadline for the 2025 tax year, and how do extensions work?

content.text: For the 2025 tax year, the federal filing deadline is April 15, 2026. File Form 4868 by then for an extension to October 15, 2026 — but that extends time to file, not to pay.

message.content: yes, save it as a file in this folder

content.text: Done — wrote tax-deadlines-2026.md with the key dates and the file-vs-pay distinction.
